ListAlarmRecord.level: Filter by alarm level, values: INFO, WARN, CRITICAL
ListAlarmRecord.state: Filter by alarm state, values: OK: recovered, ALERT: alerting, CLOSED: closed
ListAlarmRecord.startDateTime: Query start time, UTC, default: 30 days ago
ListAlarmRecord.endDateTime: Query end time, UTC, default: current time
ListAlarmRecord.orderBy: Sort field, startTime: alarm start time, endTime: alarm end time, default: startTime
ListAlarmRecord.order: Sort order, asc: ascending, desc: descending, default: desc
ListAlarmRecord.pageSize: Number of items per page, max: 100
